title: Broadcom Cluster
description: A Cluster represents a grouping of ESXi hosts that share resources and provide high availability, distributed resource scheduling, and vSAN storage capabilities.

id.description: The unique identifier of the cluster.

name.description: The display name of the cluster.

ha_enabled.description: Whether vSphere High Availability is enabled for the cluster.

drs_enabled.description: Whether Distributed Resource Scheduler is enabled for the cluster.

drs_automation_level.description: The DRS automation level for the cluster.

vsan_enabled.description: Whether vSAN is enabled for the cluster.

host_count.description: The number of hosts in the cluster.

hosts.description: The identifiers of hosts belonging to this cluster.

resource_pool.description: The root resource pool identifier for the cluster.

datacenter.description: The identifier of the datacenter containing this cluster.

is_stretched.description: Whether the cluster is a stretched cluster spanning multiple sites.

primary_datastore.description: The identifier of the primary datastore used by the cluster.
